texto: The Director's Role: You are the obstetrician. You are not the parent of this child we call the play. You are present at its birth for clinical reasons, like a doctor or midwife. Your job most of the time is simply to do no harm.When something does go wrong, however, your awareness that something is awry--and your clinical intervention to correct it--can determine whether the child will thrive or suffer, live or die.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Frank Hauser: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “The Director's Role: You are the obstetrician. You are not the parent of this child we call the p…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, advice, directing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de directing e theatre.
